title: Outlaw Killers: Three Mad Dog Brothers
original_title: 人斬り与太 狂犬三兄弟
overview: The great Bunta stars as a gangster who is sent to jail for the sake of his gang, but when he’s released he finds everything completely changed and his gang has swept him aside for being too violent. He tries to start a new life with his two ”brothers” but can’t seem to escape old affiliations
